string.name: crowdin_second_string_to_test
string.comment: Changing the order of the strings didn't cause a need for a new translation. Let's add this comment; if it's not removed it means the comment didn't cause a requirement for a new translation!

resources.string: This will be used to check that changing the order of strings does not require translation.

In order to ensure this string is not shown as untranslated, translate it the way you want. Probably using a single letter, so that it\'s quick. This string will never appear in ankidroid and is present here only to test crowdin feature.

string.name: enable_new_notifications
string.comment: Label in the developer options screen that enables the new notifications system.

string.name: edit_notifications
string.comment: Label for the notifications icon menu button that appears in the top bar of the individual deck detailed options menu, and the name of the button option for editing notifications for a deck when a deck is long clicked in the main screen, and the title of the screen that appears when users decide to edit the notifications of a single specific deck.

string.name: edit_all_app_wide_notifications
string.comment: Label for the notifications settings button which users can click to view and edit notifications that apply to all decks.

string.name: app_wide_notifications
string.comment: Title of the screen that appears when users are viewing and editing notifications that apply to all decks.

string.name: edit_all_deck_specific_notifications
string.comment: Label for the notifications settings button which users can click to view and edit notifications that apply for individual decks.

string.name: deck_specific_notifications
string.comment: Title of the screen that appears when all deck-specific notifications are being viewed and edited.
